findings.title: Right-sizing opportunity
findings.detail: Average CPU utilization stays under fifteen percent for three months; consider burstable SKUs or scheduled scale-in for right-sizing wins.

findings.title: Autoscale coverage
findings.detail: Batch pools lack autoscale profiles tied to queue depth; workers remain at max scale.

findings.title: Showback granularity
findings.detail: FinOps dashboards aggregate entire subscription; SKU-level chargeback unavailable to teams.
